projectDescription: A fast, lightweight, cross-platform desktop feed reader supporting RSS/ATOM/JSON/iCalendar feeds, podcast playback, XMPP, Gemini protocol, and integration with major online feed services.
keyFeatures: Multi-format feed support (RSS, ATOM, RDF, JSON, iCalendar, Sitemap)
Integration with Feedly, Gmail, FreshRSS, Inoreader, Nextcloud News, Tiny Tiny RSS, and more
Built-in media/podcast player (libmpv and QtMultimedia backends)
JavaScript-based article filtering with full scripting API
Website scraping via custom scripts to generate feeds
XMPP PubSub, single-user and multi-user chat support
Gemini protocol support for secure feed fetching
Customizable skins using Qt stylesheets and HTML/CSS
Cross-platform: Windows, Linux, macOS, BSD, OS/2
Portable mode and dual database backend (SQLite/MariaDB)
Labels/tags with synchronization to supported online services
Plugin system for extending service integrations via C++ API
publicApiSurface: msg — Global article object in filter scripts (title, url, contents, isRead, isImportant, assignLabel, etc.)
feed — Global feed object in filter scripts (customId, title)
acc — Global account object in filter scripts (findLabel, createLabel, availableLabels)
app.log(), app.showNotification() — Application utility functions in filter scripts
utils — Utility functions (fromXmlToJson, readTextFile, writeTextFile, parseDateTime)
fs.runExecutable(), fs.runExecutableGetOutput() — Filesystem/process execution in filter scripts
ServiceEntryPoint — C++ plugin base class for new service integrations
ServiceRoot — C++ plugin account class for service plugin core functionality
